title: Real Estate Market in the Digital Age
subtitle: A review of technology trends and advancements shaping how real estate transactions become more efficient, transparent, and digitally enabled.
conference: 6th International Conference on Recent Trends in Advanced Computing (ICRTAC'23)
certificateAlt: ICRTAC 2023 Best Research Paper certificate awarded to Shivani Jain
contribution: Led the research process from data collection and analysis to drafting the final manuscript, strengthening my understanding of real estate systems and the technologies transforming them.
highlights: Reviewed digital technologies transforming real estate transactions.
Analyzed case studies showing practical technology implementation.
Identified future trends and potential areas of market disruption.
